reviews.comment:
Ni 1 estrella se merecen,el día de hoy fui a comprar al shop y la atención recibida es pésima,malas caras,no te saludan ni saben decir Gracias o de nada...te atienden peor que un perro,al elegir la promoción de café,7mil pesos ,1cafe y 3 facturas nada barato...te quieren cobrar más caro x un vaso de cartón para llevar??? 2mil pesos más...no es x la plata es x la falta de educación recibida,de cuarta....

(Translated by Google)
They don't even deserve 1 star. Today I went shopping at the store and the service I received was terrible, they had bad faces, they didn't greet you or know how to say thank you or anything... they treated you worse than a dog, when choosing the coffee promotion, 7 thousand pesos, 1 coffee and 3 bills, not cheap at all... do they want to charge you more for a cardboard cup to go??? 2 thousand pesos more... it's not because of the money, it's because of the lack of education received, fourth rate...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pSZldYRldlRzlWU2tsWGMyMVRVMDA0UldSclFsRRAB
